description: Machine-readable expected-output harness for AutoTreeGen deterministic evaluation against Trees 01–20.

execution_model.input: Each tree JSON object is supplied independently to the AutoTreeGen engine.
execution_model.pass_fail_rule: A tree passes when all evaluation_assertions pass and required expected_engine_flags are present unless the assertion explicitly permits alternative statuses.

critical_failure_conditions: Confirming a relationship expected to be Rejected with max_confidence <= 0.20
Treating public-tree-only famous descent as Confirmed
Overwriting biological/social relationship type in NPE/adoption cases
Failing to preserve source provenance in GEDCOM safe merge

evaluation_assertions.assertion: Engine must not confirm I3 as biological father
Engine must flag Schneerson bridge as high-severity fabrication
Engine must preserve Levitin metric-book relationships as confirmed
